name: ccg
description: Codex-native CCG workflow planner and executor. Codex creates plans, orchestrates Gemini, applies code, verifies changes, and reports results.

interface.shortDescription: Run CCG plans with Codex as executor and Gemini as helper
interface.longDescription: A Codex-native rewrite of the CCG workflow. Codex owns planning, implementation, and verification, while Gemini can be called through bounded standard prompt templates with a local browser preview for read-only planning analysis, drafts, edge-case analysis, tests, or review.
